# galaxy_groups (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `result` (Attributes List) A page of results. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `created_on` (String) Creation date (read only)
- `external_id` (String) SCIM external ID (read only)
- `group_id` (String) Group ID (read only)
- `group_name` (String) Group name (read only)
- `modified_on` (String) Modified date (read only)
- `roles` (Attributes List) Roles assigned to this group (read only) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result--roles))
- `users` (Attributes List) Users directly assigned to this group (read only) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result--users))

<a id="nestedatt--result--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.roles`

Read-Only:

- `role_id` (String) Role ID (read only)
- `role_name` (String) Role name (read only)


<a id="nestedatt--result--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.users`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) User email
- `user_id` (String) User ID
